commands: web search arXiv 2209.04369 higgsless sound-wave gravitational waves phase transition
warnings: Report run_status is warning because upstream librarian, critic/model, PTA, constraints, and prior-audit handoffs have warning status.
The report treats the PTA/PTArcade posterior as conditional on the selected bf template, priors, and limited convergence checks.
The report does not claim collider, beam-dump, SN1987A, BBN, CMB, direct-detection, or indirect-detection exclusions because the constraints handoff did not apply those exclusions.
The PTA-template metadata for arXiv:2511.15687 and arXiv:2209.04369 was not fully present in the PTA handoff and was cross-checked directly on arXiv/web search before citation.
approximations: The final report is a synthesis of upstream handoffs and does not perform new physics calculations.
Constraint discussion follows the constraints handoff's rectangular PTArcade 1sigma box approximation.
The reference list includes only papers cited in the final report and verified through upstream handoffs or direct arXiv/web metadata checks.

included_sections.name: Summary
notes: Distinguishes robust pipeline outputs from caveated PTA and constraint claims.

included_sections.name: Constraints
notes: Does not state experimental exclusions where constraints were not applied.

included_sections.name: Assumptions and Limitations
notes: Emphasizes high-severity uncontrolled assumptions and required followups.

included_sections.name: Conclusions
notes: Restricts claims to conditional PTA compatibility and missing-constraint followups.

included_sections.name: References
notes: No rejected or unverified cited references remain.
